name: terraform-aws
description: AWS infrastructure with Terraform: VPC, EKS, RDS, S3, Lambda, SageMaker, Bedrock, EMR, Redshift, OpenSearch, MSK, Kinesis, and ML-specific services.
author: anwar

commands.name: tf:aws-vpc
commands.prompt:
Create AWS VPC with:
- VPC: CIDR, DNS hostnames, DNS resolution, flow logs
- Subnets: public, private, database, EKS (across AZs)
- NAT: gateway (single/multi-AZ), instance
- Gateway: internet, egress-only, transit gateway
- Endpoints: S3, DynamoDB, ECR, CloudWatch, SSM, interface endpoints
- Security: security groups, NACLs, flow logs
- Peering: VPC peering, transit gateway attachments
- DNS: Route53 private hosted zones, resolver rules
- Tags: cost allocation, naming convention
- Modules: terraform-aws-modules/vpc/aws

commands.name: tf:aws-eks
commands.prompt:
Create EKS cluster with:
- Cluster: version, endpoint access, logging, encryption
- Node groups: managed, self-managed, Karpenter
- Instance types: GPU (p4/p5/g5), CPU (m6i/c6i), spot
- Add-ons: VPC CNI, CoreDNS, kube-proxy, EBS CSI, EFS CSI
- IRSA: IAM roles for service accounts
- Fargate: profiles, selectors
- Karpenter: NodePool, NodeClass, consolidation, disruption
- GPU: NVIDIA device plugin, MIG, time-slicing
- Networking: CNI config, security groups for pods
- Monitoring: CloudWatch, Prometheus, ADOT
- Upgrade: cluster, node groups, add-ons

commands.name: tf:aws-ml
commands.prompt:
Create AWS ML infrastructure with:
- SageMaker: domain, user profiles, spaces, notebook instances, pipelines, model registry, endpoints, feature store
- Bedrock: model access, knowledge bases, agents, guardrails, evaluation
- EMR: clusters, Serverless, Studio, EKS, Spark, Flink, Iceberg
- Redshift: Serverless, provisioned, RA3, ML integration
- OpenSearch: domain, Serverless, k-NN, ML Commons
- MSK: clusters, Serverless, Kafka Connect, Schema Registry
- Kinesis: Data Streams, Data Firehose, Data Analytics
- Lambda: functions, layers, container images, provisioned concurrency
- S3: buckets, versioning, lifecycle, Intelligent-Tiering, access points
- Glue: catalog, crawlers, jobs, DataBrew, Data Quality
- Lake Formation: permissions, governance, transactions

arguments.name: services
arguments.description: Comma-separated: sagemaker, bedrock, emr, redshift, opensearch, msk, kinesis

commands.name: tf:aws-data
commands.prompt:
Create data infrastructure with:
- S3: data lake buckets, partitioning, lifecycle, access points, Object Lambda
- Glue: catalog database, tables, partitions, crawlers, classifiers
- Athena: workgroups, prepared statements, federated queries
- Lake Formation: permissions, LF-Tags, transactions, governed tables
- Redshift: cluster/Serverless, schemas, tables, materialized views, datashares
- EMR: Spark, Hive, Presto, Trino, Iceberg, Hudi, Delta Lake
- Kinesis: streaming ingestion, Firehose delivery, Analytics
- MSK: Kafka topics, Schema Registry, Connect, MirrorMaker
- DMS: replication, CDC, validation, transformation
- DataZone: domain, projects, glossary, lineage
- QuickSight: datasets, analyses, dashboards, embedding

arguments.name: components
arguments.description: s3, glue, athena, lakeformation, redshift, emr, kinesis, msk

commands.name: tf:aws-security
commands.prompt:
Implement AWS security with:
- IAM: roles, policies, conditions, boundaries, access analyzer
- Organizations: SCPs, delegated admin, trusted access
- Secrets: Secrets Manager, Parameter Store, rotation
- KMS: keys, aliases, policies, rotation, external keys
- GuardDuty: detector, findings, publishing
- Security Hub: standards, controls, insights
- Config: rules, conformance packs, remediation
-ediation
- CloudTrail: organization trail, data events, insights
- WAF: web ACL, rules, rate limiting, logging
- Shield: Standard, Advanced, DDoS protection
- Network Firewall: rule groups, policies, logging
- PrivateLink: endpoint services, VPC endpoints

commands.name: tf:aws-gitops
commands.prompt:
Set up GitOps on AWS with:
- ArgoCD: installation, applications, projects, repositories
- Flux: bootstrap, controllers, kustomize, helm
- EKS: cluster access, IRSA for controllers
- Secrets: SealedSecrets, External Secrets, Vault
- Repository: GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, CodeCommit
- Environments: dev, staging, prod with promotion
- Progressive: Argo Rollouts, Flagger, canary, blue-green
- Drift: detection, auto-sync, prune
- RBAC: SSO, OIDC, GitHub Teams
- Notifications: Slack, email, webhook
- Audit: ArgoCD notifications, Flux events

agents.name: aws-architect
agents.prompt: You are an AWS architect. Expert in: VPC, EKS, SageMaker, Bedrock, EMR, Redshift, OpenSearch, MSK, Kinesis, Lambda, S3, Glue, Lake Formation, IAM, Organizations, Security Hub, GuardDuty, ArgoCD, Flux, Karpenter. Build production ML/data platforms on AWS with Terraform. Focus on: security, cost optimization, scalability, reliability, compliance, GitOps.
